title: geranium argenteum subsp. cinereum
intro: Geranium argenteum subsp. cinereum, also known as Mountain Crane's-bill, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as bloating, indigestion, and irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of Mountain Crane's-bill include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Mountain Crane's-bill can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
